title.rendered: WagerGeeks at ICE Barcelona 2025: Join Us

content.rendered:
We are thrilled to announce that ICE Barcelona 2025, scheduled for January 20-22, 2025, promises to be one of the biggest iGaming events of the year. It will gather many leading service providers, gaming enthusiasts, and industry experts to share valuable insights and ideas, technologies, and trends shaping the future of iGaming. As a key player in the industry, WagerGeeks is excited to attend this event, where we will explore innovative opportunities and connect with industry leaders from across the globe.

We aim to discuss betting, casino games, crash games, our newly launched AI chatbot(Instant Assist), and many other iGaming tactics. ICE Barcelona 2025 will consist of:

  • 630+ Global Exhibitors
  • 80,000 Visitors across 3 days
  • 55,000+ Unique Attendees

As one of the largest events dedicated to the iGaming community, it’s the perfect platform to discuss game-changing trends and technologies. Industry leaders will share valuable insights and ideas that will shape the future of iGaming.

Our partner Crash/ENT will exhibit their innovative solutions, bringing even more value to the event. We will explore the latest gaming technology, data solutions, and service offerings. 

ICE Barcelona 2025 is the ideal platform to foster collaboration and growth within the iGaming sector. Its global audience of developers, operators, and business leaders is expected to attend. At this event, the industry’s innovative minds will come together to explore new opportunities and learn about the latest industry shifts. 

We invite all iGaming professionals, to meet us at ICE Barcelona 2025 and elevate the future of iGaming together. Be sure to meet with our team to discuss how we can help take your iGaming business to the next level. 

Let’s connect at info@wagergeeks.com or manish@wagergeeks.com, if you will join this event!
